summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive items were present, no shared canonical was invented, and no close, merge, fix, or label action is recommended.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR for a still-open linked issue; keep it related and do not close or merge in this plan-mode inventory shard.
Open maintainer-owned replacement work remains related to the closed broad stack, but it requires maintainer review and is not eligible for merge or closeout here.
This is the live replacement PR for an already-closed predecessor; keep it related and open for normal review/proof handling.
Useful focused PR tied to an open bug, but proof/check state blocks any stronger recommendation in this plan-mode shard.
